title: Camps * Autism Spectrum Disorder - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Camps * Autism Spectrum Disorder 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Families/Friends of People With Cancer Former Foster Children Foster Children Muscular Dystrophy Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KINDTREE KINDTREE AUTISM ROCKS FRIENDS & FAMILY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Long weekend camp provides optional activities including crafts, swimming, great food, a woodsy outdoor setting, karaoke, a talent show, campfires, outdoor movies, games, face painting, nature walks, a family feeling, and more. Eligibility: Persons with autism and other intellectual disabilities and their friends and families Hours: Varies by service occurs annually in late August.
